response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio lyrics phonetically match the provided JSON references for both Japanese and English/Indonesian songs. 2. subtitles.english: With a louder voice

subtitles.original: 未来の僕らに まだ見ぬキミに
subtitles.english: To our future selves and to the you I haven't met yet

subtitles.original: 伝えたいこと沢山あるんだ
subtitles.english: There are many things I want to convey

subtitles.original: 迎えたイマは当たり前なんかじゃない
subtitles.english: The present we've reached isn't something to take for granted
Spread your wings, come on, let's...
...fly now!
Take my hand!

subtitles.original: 連れて行くよ！光の真ん中
subtitles.english: I'll take you to the center of the light
beyond the dream

subtitles.original: 羽ばたける勇気はキミの願い
subtitles.english: The courage to fly is your wish

subtitles.original: 皆で繋いだこの奇跡が
subtitles.english: This miracle we connected together

subtitles.original: 途切れないように歌うんだ
subtitles.english: I sing so it won't break

subtitles.original: もっと高く！大きな声で
subtitles.english: With a louder voice
Coloring our future
Resound everywhere, Prism Melody!

subtitles.original: Won't you just forget about the past?
subtitles.english: Won't you just forget about the past?

subtitles.original: Cause in time it will never matter
subtitles.english: Cause in time it will never matter

subtitles.original: But the love we had, I'm hoping it will last
subtitles.english: But the love we had, I'm hoping it will last
Together we have been through it
Laughter and jokes became memories

subtitles.original: Pastikan artinya kan cerahkan mu nanti
subtitles.english: Make sure the meaning will brighten you later

subtitles.original: To do what you were meant to do
subtitles.english: To do what you were meant to do

subtitles.original: For it's time to make it true
subtitles.english: For it's time to make it true
Together we can always stand
Your hand in my hand
Forever hand in hand
To start dreaming
Grab what you're looking for

subtitles.original: Teriakkan, la la la la la, la la la la la
subtitles.english: Shout out, la la la la la, la la la la la
You won't be alone

subtitles.original: It's time to show them who you are
subtitles.english: It's time to show them who you are

subtitles.original: Just shout it from the mountain high
subtitles.english: Just shout it from the mountain high

subtitles.original: To the sky we go, we go
subtitles.english: To the sky we go, we go
Together we have been through it
Laughter and jokes became memories

subtitles.english: For it's time to make it true

subtitles.original: Teriakkan, la la la la la, la la la la la
subtitles.english: Shout out, la la la la la, la la la la la
You won't be alone
So go and travel far

subtitles.original: Run and show them who you are
subtitles.english: Run and show them who you are

subtitles.original: I'll be singing, la la la la la, la la la la la
subtitles.english: I'll be singing, la la la la la, la la la la la

subtitles.original: Be who you meant to be
subtitles.english: Be who you meant to be
